subject: A bearded craftsman in green clothing carving wood at a worn workbench in a cluttered workshop
description: A bearded man in green clothing leans over a worn wooden workbench in a cluttered workshop, carving wood with both hands. Tools and shavings are scattered around. Daylight comes through a side window. Palette is warm woodgrain greens and browns. Mood is focused, dignified labor. Flavor text frames him as the unsung craftsman: 'Countless knights of Garenbrig owe their lives to his peerless craftsmanship.'
foreground: Bearded craftsman carving wood at a cluttered workbench
background: Workshop interior with tools, shelves, hanging cloth
